steps.title: Optimal control formulation and analysis
steps.instruction: Methods section gives qualitative analyses which conducted on the uncontrolled epidemic system. We now generalize the model to time-dependent control variables.x1(t) andx2(t)) to formulate the optimal control problem.

steps.title: Optimal control formulation and analysis
steps.instruction: An optimal control problem for the fractional-order Lassa fever model is formulated and examined in this section. Public enlightenment and quarantine enforcement are treated as decision variables whose optimal deployment minimizes disease burden while accounting for implementation costs.
